work_packages.name: Infrastructure / Backbone / Protocols / Gates
work_packages.description: Defines the rules of the game. It holds the backbone specifications, the gate definitions, the source family models, and the delta-ready processes.

work_packages.name: Global Source Inventory / Source State Registry / Freeze Map
work_packages.description: The map of the territory. Updates the Global Source Inventory and logs the current sync state in the Source State Registry.

work_packages.name: Source Acquisition by Branch
work_packages.description: The fetching layer. Separated by branch so that failures do not block other acquisitions. Produces raw data, source cards, manifests, and checksums.

work_packages.name: Normalization / Structuring / Deduplication
work_packages.description: The standardization layer. Converts raw data into standard yOS schemas, removes noise, and deduplicates.

work_packages.name: Knowledge Distillation / Memory Candidates
work_packages.description: The synthesis layer. Extracts high-value concepts, decisions, and context.

work_packages.name: KAP-to-Mem0 Instillation
work_packages.description: The injection layer. Pushes distilled knowledge into Mem0 and Notion.

work_packages.name: Retrieval Tests / yOS Memory Validation
work_packages.description: The testing layer. Runs retrieval tests to ensure knowledge can be recalled by yOS agents.

work_packages.name: Canonization / Ontology / KOSMOS-yOS Integration
work_packages.description: The integration layer. Merges validated knowledge into the Elysium Civilizational Ontology.

work_packages.name: Autonomous yOS Knowledge Consolidation Loop
work_packages.description: The operational layer. Converts the pipeline into an autonomous loop triggered by cron jobs or telemetry.
